creator: huanghwh@gmail.com
text:
open Impress, input char, soffice.bin will eat cpu and memory very quickly.
I have to set SAL_USE_VCLPLUGIN=gen fallback to x11 or SAL_NO_NWF=1, then libreoffice is ok.


$ pkg info -x sway
sway-1.10
swaybg-1.2.1
swayidle-1.8.0_1
swaylock-effects-1.7.0.0_2
swayr-0.27.4_2
swayrbar-0.4.0_2
$ pkg info -x libreoffice
libreoffice-24.8.2.1
zh_CN-libreoffice-24.8.2.1
$ uname -a
FreeBSD mbxp.jopens.cn 14.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE #5 n267679-10e31f0946d8-dirty: Tue Jun 11 11:17:29 CST 2024     root@mbxp.jopens.cn:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MBXP amd64
